evals.prompt: Write unit tests for my generic action
evals.expected_output: Test file created in test/ directory using Jest, mocks logger via @adobe/aio-sdk, tests 200/400/500 response paths with appropriate params and assertions.

assertions.description: Creates a Jest test file in the test directory matching the action structure.
Uses Jest mocking to isolate SDK dependencies.
Tests the success (200) response path.
Tests the bad input (400) response path.
Tests the SDK failure (500) response path.

evals.prompt: Add integration tests for my deployed action
evals.expected_output: Integration test file that invokes the deployed action via aio CLI or HTTP, asserts response schema including statusCode and body structure.

assertions.description: Creates an integration test file separate from unit tests.
Invokes the deployed action via CLI command or HTTP request.
Asserts the response status from the deployed action.

evals.prompt: My action uses State SDK — help me mock it in tests
evals.expected_output: Proper jest.mock() setup for @adobe/aio-lib-state with mock init(), get(), put(), delete() methods; tests cover get/put/delete paths with assertions.

assertions.description: Creates or updates a test file for the action.
Sets up jest.mock() for @adobe/aio-lib-state.
Tests State SDK operations (get, put, delete).
Configures mock return values for State SDK methods.

evals.prompt: Run tests and show me coverage
evals.expected_output: Executes npx jest --coverage or aio app test, reports line and branch coverage percentages.

assertions.description: Runs Jest with coverage flag or aio app test.
Reports coverage metrics including statements, lines, or branches.

evals.prompt: Write component tests for my data table page that displays items fetched from a backend action
evals.expected_output: Component test file using Testing Library with Provider wrapper, mocks action calls, tests loading/success/error states with async utilities.

assertions.description: Creates a test file in the test directory.
Wraps component in React Spectrum Provider.
Uses defaultTheme with the Provider wrapper.
Uses async Testing Library utilities for data-dependent assertions.
Mocks backend action calls.

evals.prompt: Add tests for my AEM Content Fragment Console extension action bar button component
evals.expected_output: Component test with UIX guest mock providing sharedContext, tests extension registration and guest connection.
evals.setup_notes: Scaffold must include web-src/src/components/ExtensionRegistration.jsx using @adobe/uix-guest with register() and actionBar extension point, and web-src/package.json with @adobe/uix-guest and @adobe/react-spectrum dependencies

assertions.description: Creates a test file in the test directory.
Mocks @adobe/uix-guest SDK.
Uses sharedContext or guestConnection from the UIX guest mock.
Tests extension registration or attachment.
